name: New Thing
Dual MVA Cross
description: A momentum-based trend-following strategy that enters long positions when the short-term moving average crosses above the long-term moving average, signaling upward momentum. Positions are exited when the reverse crossover occurs or stop/take-profit thresholds are hit.

name: Mean RV2
custom_code:
def strategy_logic(data):
    # Calculate moving averages
    data['ma_short'] = data['close'].rolling(window=10).mean()
    data['ma_long'] = data['close'].rolling(window=50).mean()
    
    # Entry condition: short MA crosses above long MA → BUY
    if data['ma_short'].iloc[-2] < data['ma_long'].iloc[-2] and data['ma_short'].iloc[-1] > data['ma_long'].iloc[-1]:
        return 'BUY'
    
    # Exit condition: Stop Loss or Take Profit hit handled by system
    # Also exit if short MA crosses below long MA → SELL
    if data['ma_short'].iloc[-2] > data['ma_long'].iloc[-2] and data['ma_short'].iloc[-1] < data['ma_long'].iloc[-1]:
        return 'SELL'
    
    # Otherwise, hold position
    return 'HOLD'

name: dual mva cross 1 min
custom_code:
def strategy_logic(data):
    # --- Moving Average Crossover Strategy ---
    # Calculate short-term and long-term moving averages
    short_window = 10
    long_window = 50

    data['ma_short'] = data['close'].rolling(window=short_window).mean()
    data['ma_long'] = data['close'].rolling(window=long_window).mean()

    # Check if we have enough data
    if len(data) < long_window:
        return 'HOLD'

    # Entry: short MA crosses above long MA -> BUY
    if data['ma_short'].iloc[-2] < data['ma_long'].iloc[-2] and data['ma_short'].iloc[-1] > data['ma_long'].iloc[-1]:
        return 'BUY'

    # Exit: short MA crosses below long MA -> SELL
    if data['ma_short'].iloc[-2] > data['ma_long'].iloc[-2] and data['ma_short'].iloc[-1] < data['ma_long'].iloc[-1]:
        return 'SELL'

    # Otherwise hold
    return 'HOLD'
